steps.title: Set up the conditional probability
steps.content:
$$P(\text{medium} \mid \text{Hawks}) = \frac{\text{medium Hawks T-shirts}}{\text{total Hawks T-shirts}}$$
Restrict the sample space to Hawks T-shirts only.

steps.title: Compute from the table
steps.content:
Using the table values, the medium Hawks count divided by the total Hawks count simplifies to $\frac{1}{2}=0.5$.

The answer is 0.5 (or equivalently $\frac{1}{2}$).
